name: Forest Wolf
description: A relatively tame gray wolf with thick fur and piercing amber eyes, often seen patrolling the edges of woodlands. It is known for its keen senses and loyalty to its small pack.

name: Glimmer Goblin
description: A small, mischievous goblin with greenish skin and large pointed ears, commonly found scavenging near forest paths. It carries a tiny satchel of shiny trinkets and avoids direct confrontation.

name: Wandering Skeleton
description: A basic animated skeleton held together by faint magic, shuffling slowly through old ruins. Its hollow eye sockets glow softly as it searches for lost trinkets.

name: Moonhowl Wolf
description: A common silver-furred wolf that howls at night but remains relatively tame around travelers. Its distinctive white streak along the spine helps it blend into moonlight.

name: Mossback Goblin
description: A sturdy goblin covered in patches of green moss, living in damp caves and trading small herbs. It has a friendly demeanor despite its scruffy appearance.

name: Rattlebone Skeleton
description: A lightly armored skeleton whose bones clatter softly as it walks the forgotten battlefields. It carries a rusty short sword but poses little threat to the prepared.

name: Timber Wolf
description: A common brown wolf with strong legs and a bushy tail, frequently spotted near logging camps. It is curious but keeps its distance from humans.

name: Tinker Goblin
description: A clever goblin with tools dangling from its belt, often repairing broken items near villages. Its large nose and bright eyes give it a harmless, inventive look.

name: Dustwalker Skeleton
description: A weathered skeleton covered in desert dust, wandering old caravan routes. Its movements are slow and deliberate, rarely aggressive.

name: Shadowpelt Wolf
description: A dark-furred wolf with subtle black markings that help it hide in twilight forests. It is tame enough to occasionally follow lone travelers from afar.

name: Cave Goblin
description: A pale-skinned goblin adapted to underground life, carrying a dim lantern. It collects mushrooms and avoids bright sunlight.

name: Bone Scout
description: A nimble skeleton missing one arm, used as a lookout in ancient ruins. Its jaw hangs loosely but its posture remains upright.

name: Pack Runner Wolf
description: A lean, energetic wolf with reddish fur that leads small hunting groups. It is common in hilly regions and rarely attacks unless provoked.

name: River Goblin
description: A slippery goblin with webbed fingers living by streams, fishing with crude nets. Its wide grin reveals small sharp teeth.

name: Ironjaw Skeleton
description: A skeleton with a reinforced jawbone, often found guarding old crypt entrances. It moves with surprising steadiness for an undead creature.

name: Frostfang Wolf
description: A hardy wolf with icy-blue eyes and thick winter coat, common in northern woods. It is relatively tame and scavenges rather than hunts aggressively.

name: Hill Goblin
description: A stocky goblin with earthy brown skin that dwells in grassy hills. It tends small gardens and trades vegetables with passersby.

name: Lost Wanderer Skeleton
description: A skeleton still wearing tattered traveler's clothes, roaming country roads. Its empty ribcage occasionally houses small forest creatures.

name: Bramble Wolf
description: A shaggy wolf with twigs and leaves caught in its fur, living deep in thorny thickets. Its calm nature makes it less threatening than its wild cousins.

name: Spark Goblin
description: A small goblin with singed eyebrows from tinkering with fire, often seen near campsites. It carries a pouch of flint stones.

name: Shieldbearer Skeleton
description: A skeleton equipped with a cracked wooden shield, standing guard at old fortifications. Its movements are mechanical and predictable.

name: Dusk Wolf
description: A common wolf with sleek dark gray fur that emerges at twilight. It has soft golden eyes and a gentle howl.

name: Root Goblin
description: A goblin with vines wrapped around its arms, living among ancient tree roots. It is skilled at herbalism and quite sociable.

name: Skullbearer Skeleton
description: A tall skeleton carrying an extra skull on its belt, wandering graveyards. It seems more curious than hostile.

name: Highland Wolf
description: A sturdy wolf with mottled brown and white fur adapted to rocky highlands. It is known for its endurance and calm temperament.

name: Swamp Goblin
description: A greenish goblin with muddy feet that navigates foggy wetlands. It collects reeds and sings quiet tunes to itself.

name: Arrowhead Skeleton
description: A skeleton with several broken arrows lodged in its ribs, shambling through old battle sites. Its grip on a rusted bow is surprisingly firm.

name: Silent Prowler Wolf
description: A stealthy wolf with muted brown coat and large paws, common in dense forests. It observes more than it attacks.

name: Burrow Goblin
description: A short goblin with powerful digging claws, living in extensive tunnel networks. Its large eyes are adapted to low light.

name: Chainlink Skeleton
description: A skeleton dragging rusty chains behind it, once a prisoner in life. It moves slowly through dungeons.

name: Meadow Wolf
description: A friendly-looking wolf with golden fur often seen in open grasslands. It hunts small game and avoids larger threats.

name: Forge Goblin
description: A soot-covered goblin that works small forges near mining towns. It has a knack for simple metal repairs.

name: Echo Skeleton
description: A skeleton whose bones resonate with faint echoes in caves, repeating distant sounds. It is a common sight in mountain passages.

name: Mist Wolf
description: A pale gray wolf that blends into morning fog, common near lakes and rivers. Its howls are soft and haunting.

name: Trader Goblin
description: A goblin wearing a patched vest full of pockets, traveling between villages with goods. Its friendly haggling is well known.

name: Ancient Bonewalker
description: An old skeleton with yellowed bones covered in faint runes, slowly patrolling temple grounds. It seems almost peaceful.

name: Snowpaw Wolf
description: A white wolf with padded feet suited for snowy terrain, common in colder climates. It is relatively tame and curious about camps.

name: Leafcloak Goblin
description: A goblin adorned with leaves and twigs for camouflage in forests. It gathers berries and nuts to trade.

name: Helmet Skeleton
description: A skeleton wearing a dented iron helmet, marching along old military roads. Its posture is surprisingly disciplined.

name: Thorn Wolf
description: A resilient wolf with scarred hide from brambles, living on forest borders. It has a watchful but non-aggressive nature.

name: Gemeye Goblin
description: A goblin with unusually bright eyes that sparkle like gems, hunting for shiny stones in riverbeds. It is playful and harmless.

name: Wispbone Skeleton
description: A frail-looking skeleton surrounded by faint glowing motes, drifting through misty graveyards. Its presence is more eerie than dangerous.
